name: day:2
description: Day 2 — Language AI / 2日目 言語AI

name: day:3
description: Day 3 — Data & Machines That See / 3日目 データと見る機械

name: day:4
description: Day 4 — Vibe Coding / 4日目 バイブコーディング

name: type:concept
description: Understand an idea or how something works / 言葉や仕組みを理解する

name: type:build
description: Make or code something / 何かを作る・コードを書く

name: type:create
description: Creative output: image, music, video / 画像・音楽・動画などの創作

name: type:experiment
description: Try something and observe what happens / 試して観察する

name: type:security
description: Break it or defend it on purpose / わざと壊す・守る

name: type:reflection
description: Look back: what I learned and what is next / 振り返り・次に使うこと

name: type:question
description: A question that came up during the day / その日に出た問い

name: type:stuck
description: Got stuck, something broke, or I was wrong during the day / その日に詰まった・壊れた・間違えた

name: status:ready
description: Ready to start / すぐに始められる

name: status:in-progress
description: Working on it now / いま取り組み中

name: status:reviewing
description: Rethinking or reviewing my answer / 見直し・考え直し中

name: status:done
description: Finished and recorded / 終わって記録済み

name: needs:hint
description: I want a hint first, not the answer / まずヒントがほしい

name: needs:explanation
description: Explain it step by step / 順番に説明してほしい

name: needs:example
description: Show a similar example / 似た例がほしい

name: needs:review
description: Check my own work / 自分の答えを見てほしい

name: needs:teacher-check
description: A teacher should also look / 先生にも確認してほしい

name: difficulty:easy
description: Easy challenge tier / 初級チャレンジ

name: difficulty:medium
description: Medium challenge tier / 中級チャレンジ

name: difficulty:hard
description: Hard challenge tier / 上級チャレンジ

name: ai-tool:ollama
description: I thought this through with Ollama / Ollamaと一緒に考えた

name: ai-tool:vibe-local
description: I thought this through with vibe-local / vibe-localと一緒に考えた

name: ai-tool:other
description: I used another AI helper / 別のAIを使った

name: portfolio:show
description: Show on the web thinking report / Web思考レポートに載せる

name: portfolio:hide
description: Keep off the web thinking report / Web思考レポートに載せない
